---
title: Python coding rules
scope: project
---

<!-- Generated by `harness rules bootstrap`. Edit to tune; re-run to regenerate. -->

- MUST keep `ruff check` and `ruff format` clean before declaring work done; `ruff format` owns whitespace/quotes/line-wrapping (defaults: line-length 88, double quotes, space indent) — never hand-format to fight it.
- MUST treat Ruff's default `["E4","E7","E9","F"]` as a floor; this repo expects `I` (import sort), `B` (bugbear), `UP` (pyupgrade), and `SIM` enabled in `lint.select`. Pin `target-version` to the project's real minimum.
- NEVER use mutable default arguments (`def f(x=[])`, `={}`) or evaluate calls in defaults (B006/B008); default to `None` and build the value inside the body.
- MUST annotate all function signatures and Pydantic/LangGraph state models; use builtin generics (`list[str]`, `dict[str,int]`) and `X | None` over `typing.List`/`Optional` (UP rules), and keep `mypy` clean.
- MUST validate all external/boundary data (API routes, Bedrock/LLM output, GitHub payloads, DB rows) through Pydantic v2 models — never hand-roll dict key-poking or trust `**kwargs` shapes.
- In `async def` code (LangGraph nodes, API handlers) NEVER call blocking I/O — no `time.sleep`, `requests`, sync DB drivers, or plain `open()` (ASYNC2xx); use `await`/async clients or `asyncio.to_thread`. Never fire-and-forget a coroutine without awaiting or tracking the task.
- MUST compare to `None`/`True`/`False` with `is`/`is not` (E711/E712) and test emptiness via truthiness (`if not items:`), not `== None` or `len(x) == 0`.
- NEVER use bare `except:` or catch blind `Exception` to swallow errors (E722/BLE001); catch the narrowest type and re-raise with `raise NewError(...) from err` to preserve the chain.
- MUST log with lazy `%`-style args (`logger.error("failed %s", id)`), NOT f-strings inside logging calls (G004); reserve f-strings for non-logging string building.
- MUST use `pathlib.Path` over `os.path`, and acquire files/connections/locks via `with` context managers — never leave handles or DB sessions dangling.
- NEVER use wildcard (`from x import *`) or relative-walk imports; use absolute imports and let Ruff's `I` rule own ordering/grouping.
- MUST keep secrets and config out of source — read Bedrock/GitHub/Aurora/ElevenLabs credentials from env (and the harness secret broker), never hardcode or log them.
